items.title: Apple researchers unveil LGTM, a potential boost for Apple Vision Pro graphics
items.summary: A team of Apple researchers has developed a new framework that enables high-resolution 3D scene rendering with far greater efficiency. Here are the details of the new study.

items.title: Qcells wants solar + storage built into every new home
items.summary: Solar giant Qcells is making a play to get solar and battery storage built into new homes in the US from day one.

items.title: ElevenLabs releases a new AI-powered music-generation app
